reference_goals: Thrust chamber topology — converging section, throat, diverging nozzle contour (Rao/conical)
Injector architecture — manifold zones, element patterns, face plate, acoustic cavity zones
Regenerative cooling — channel-route topology, inlet/outlet manifolds, turn-around point
Feed system — oxidizer/fuel valve tree, filter, venturi/orifice, check valve positions
Turbopump layout — impeller/inducer, turbine rotor, shaft/bearing, seal drain
Thrust structure — gimbal block, trunnion pads, flex lines, instrumentation bosses
Instrumentation/DAQ — thermocouple/pressure tap bosses, wiring conduit, interlock vocabulary
needed_metadata: Component taxonomy (not sizing) — chamber, injector, nozzle extension, TPA, valves
Material families — Inconel/copper-alloy liner, nickel superalloy turbine, SS manifolds
Interface definitions — flange bolt patterns, seal types, flex joint DOF
Energy/flow path diagram — propellant circuit topology (no flow rates or pressures)
needed_engineering_docs: Thermal boundary grammar — wall heat flux zones, film cooling regions, radiation shield
Structural boundary grammar — chamber pressure load, thrust vector, gimbal actuator loads
Vibration/acoustics grammar — combustion instability modes, baffle/cavity damper zones
Test-stand interface vocabulary — thrust measurement frame, propellant feed disconnect
safety_boundary: Academic study reference ONLY. Do NOT include: propellant handling procedures, ignition sequences, chamber pressure/thrust sizing numbers, injector orifice dimensions, turbopump performance maps, test-stand operating steps, flight qualification criteria, or any content that could enable construction or operation of a rocket engine.

crawl_targets.search: rocket engine nozzle cutaway academic STEP
